title: Elegant Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A buttery, saffron-infused chicken paella with a flambe finish, crafted with low-fat ingredients for a rich yet lighter taste.
instructions: Heat a paella pan or large skillet over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Sauté the diced onion until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic, diced red bell pepper, and smoked paprika, cooking for another 2 minutes.
Stir in the sliced chicken thighs, browning them on all sides, about 4 minutes.
Pour in the white wine, allowing it to flambe by carefully igniting with a match, and let the flames subside.
Add the rice, coating it evenly with the aromatic mixture and letting it toast for 1 minute.
Pour in the saffron infusion and the low-fat chicken broth, then season with salt and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a gentle boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the lid, increase the heat to medium-high, and cook for an additional 5 minutes until the rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes, then serve hot with a sprinkle of fresh parsley.
